subtitles.original: それぞれの道を行く
subtitles.english: ...and go our separate ways.

subtitles.original: 寂しい思い出だけが
subtitles.english: Only the lonely memories...

subtitles.original: 強く根を張ってる
subtitles.english: ...are taking deep root.

subtitles.original: まだ貫いて失って それでも挫けない
subtitles.english: I still stand firm and lose, but even so, I won't lose heart.

subtitles.original: 心はどこに 器はどこに
subtitles.english: Where is the heart? Where is the vessel?

subtitles.original: ただ残されて抜け落ちて それでも伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: I'm just left behind and falling out, but even so, I want to convey...

subtitles.original: 魂の日々を 魂の意志を
subtitles.english: ...the days of the soul, the will of the soul...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: ...forever.

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Forever...

subtitles.original: 魂の色は
subtitles.english: What color is the soul?

subtitles.original: 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color is it?

subtitles.original: 赤色ですか
subtitles.english: Is it red?

subtitles.original: 青色ですか
subtitles.english: Is it blue?

subtitles.original: 魂の色は
subtitles.english: What color is the soul?

subtitles.original: 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color is it?

subtitles.original: 透明な過去に 不透明な明日に
subtitles.english: In the transparent past, in the unclear tomorrow...

subtitles.original: 生きるあなたは何色ですか
subtitles.english: ...what color are you, living your life?

subtitles.original: また躓いて転がって それでも砕けない
subtitles.english: I stumble and fall again, but even so, I won't break.

subtitles.original: 魂の色は 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color is the soul? What color is it?

subtitles.original: ただ傷ついて強がって それでも見つけたいよ
subtitles.english: I'm just hurt and acting tough, but even so, I want to find it...

subtitles.original: 魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
subtitles.english: ...I am verifying the shape of the soul.

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Forever...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: ...forever...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: ...forever...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: ...forever.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで
subtitles.english: All right! And so,

subtitles.original: ANIMAを歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I performed "ANIMA"!

subtitles.original: カロリー高いほうだったな、水、水ください
subtitles.english: That was a high-calorie song! Water, please give me some water.

subtitles.original: カロリー高いほうだった
subtitles.english: That was really high-calorie...

subtitles.original: あぶない
subtitles.english: That was close.

subtitles.original: あ、すいません。あの、ナチュラルにマイクを返すの忘れていました。
subtitles.english: Ah, sorry. I totally forgot to return the mic.

subtitles.original: やばい、音変になってなかったならいいな、すいません。
subtitles.english: Oh dear, I hope the sound didn't go weird. Sorry!

subtitles.original: ナチュラルのに。スタッフさんがすっごい手伸ばしてくれたのに、疲れすぎでここ硬直しちゃってた。
subtitles.english: I naturally... The staff was stretching their arm out so far, but I was so tired my arm just froze.

subtitles.original: はーい
subtitles.english: Okay.

subtitles.original: 水うまい
subtitles.english: Water tastes so good.

subtitles.original: 減らない水のおかげで、生きていけてます。
subtitles.english: Thanks to this bottomless water, I'm able to survive.

subtitles.original: はい、で、ちょっとこれ返して。
subtitles.english: All right, let me return this.

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: それではですね、ま、ちょっとまだまだ続くんですけど、
subtitles.english: So, well, there's still more to come,

subtitles.original: ここいらで一旦、重大告知タイムをさせていただきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: but at this point, I'd like to have a major announcement time!

subtitles.original: じゃ、まずはいつものから行くか！じゃ、まずはこちら！
subtitles.english: First, let's start with the usual one! Here it is!

subtitles.original: 風真いろは、誕生日記念グッズ2026出ます！
subtitles.english: Kazama Iroha Birthday Celebration Goods 2026 are coming out!

subtitles.original: ドンドコドンドン、ドンドンドン！
subtitles.english: Dondokodondon, dondondon!

subtitles.original: いや、なんか良さそうなラインナップですね。
subtitles.english: Wow, it looks like a really great lineup!

subtitles.original: はい、今回もとってもこだわったグッズばかりなんで、皆さん楽しみにしていてほしいです！
subtitles.english: Yes, this time too, they're all merchandise we put a lot of care into, so please look forward to them!

subtitles.original: では、一つずつ、商品を見ていきましょう。
subtitles.english: Now, let's take a look at the items one by one.

subtitles.original: まずはこちら！
subtitles.english: First is this one!

subtitles.original: タペストリーが出ます！
subtitles.english: The tapestry is coming!

subtitles.original: タペストリー、実は個人グッズで出すの超久しぶりなんですよね。
subtitles.english: Actually, it's been a very long time since I last released a tapestry as personal merchandise.

subtitles.original: イラストは、もちぷよ先生描き下ろしで、雨上がりの青空の下で
subtitles.english: The illustration is drawn by Mochipuyo-sensei. Under the blue sky after the rain,

subtitles.original: 本当にね、このステージみたいな感じで、ライブをしている風真いろはのイメージで描いていただきました。
subtitles.english: she drew it with the image of Kazama Iroha performing a live show, just like on this stage.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: いや、めっちゃ良いよね。飾ってね！
subtitles.english: Wow, it's really nice. Please hang it up!

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: Next is this one!

subtitles.original: フード付きタオル！
subtitles.english: The hooded towel!

subtitles.original: はい、タペストリーと同じイラストのフード付きタオルです。
subtitles.english: Yes, it's a hooded towel with the same illustration as the tapestry.

subtitles.original: フード部分はぽこべぇの顔になっており、取り外しが可能となっております。
subtitles.english: The hood part has Pokobe's face and is detachable.

subtitles.original: いやなんか、こないだね、あの、HoloXのライブあったじゃん？
subtitles.english: You know, the other day, there was the HoloX live show, right?

subtitles.original: で、なんかダンスの先生に教えてもらったんだけど、
subtitles.english: And my dance teacher told me about it,

subtitles.original: なんか風真いろは、異様にタオル購入率が良かったらしいな、お前たち。
subtitles.english: but apparently, you guys had an unusually high purchase rate for Kazama's towel!

subtitles.original: 首にいっぱい巻いてくれてえらいぞ！
subtitles.english: Good job wrapping them all around your necks!

subtitles.original: フード付きタオル！
subtitles.english: A hooded towel!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation: A Deep Dive**

Okay, here's how I'm approaching this subtitle generation. The user wants subtitles from the beginning of a video to the end. My focus is on absolute accuracy and adhering to a strict set of rules, particularly around timings and zero "ghost" subtitling. I need to make sure I don't subtitle things like heavy breathing, or other non-speech sounds that don't need translation.

First, I'm verifying the start timecode. I've noted that the song begins mid-line ("それぞれの道を行く", "...and go our separate ways") at the very beginning, so the subtitles *have* to start precisely there. I'm noting the start and stop times, and that the text is already present on the screen. The very start of the video is 00:00.000, and I need to transcribe it exactly.

I'm systematically going through the video segment by segment, identifying the spoken lines and the corresponding lyrics. I'm verifying the lyrics against the provided English translations to ensure I'm using the most accurate and context-aware rendering. If a line is repeated, like "ずっと" ("Forever"), I'm grouping them to create a concise rendering, but accurately represent it.

I'm paying close attention to the timing – down to the milliseconds – to capture exactly when each phrase starts and ends. It *has* to be perfect. The key is to match the audio. I'm working line-by-line, and I need to be precise.

I need to be very careful to exclude times where there is only an instrumental guitar solo. The zero "ghost" subtitle rule is crucial. No unnecessary subtitles.

Later, I'm switching gears, paying close attention to the speaker's breathing and tone. No unnecessary subtitles here either.

Once the performance concludes, I need to subtitle the post-song talking. I need to get the precise timecodes and Japanese. Then I need to get the translations.

I'm noting when the speaker takes water or when she pauses, and will exclude these from the translation. This is more than a translation exercise, it's a careful reading and interpretation of a video to subtitle accurately and naturally.

The announcement of the merchandise is a welcome change of pace, so I'm paying attention to the details of the merch and the sound effects. Once I've transcribed and translated, I need to double-check everything. I'm aiming for impeccable accuracy with perfect timing.
